Thanks [~vrushalic] for the patch. The patch looks good overall. Some minor comments:

1) Some comments in the DomainRowKey class is still referring to app_flow_table.

2) The DomainTable is missing writers as one of its columns. Also, let's add a link of TimelineDomain documentation (possibly the apache official doc where it is introduced).

3) I recall that we want to do compression on the domain table. Is that something done at table creation time?

The other thing I am thinking is, whether do we want to think of the cases where one application modifies domains posted by another application. This seems allowed at the moment.

Thanks [~haibochen] for the review!

Yes I will update the domain row key documentation, good catch!

bq. The DomainTable is missing writers as one of its columns. Also, let's add a link of TimelineDomain documentation (possibly the apache official doc where it is introduced).
We can have more columns that may not be listed. It is not necessary to define all columns though. But I will add it. 
Good point about the link to TimelineDomain documentation, will add it. 

bq. I recall that we want to do compression on the domain table. Is that something done at table creation time?
Very good point. I have not added in compression as part of the table creation. I was thinking we might want to mention it in the documentation and point to hbase docs regarding enabling it. The reason is that, no matter what codec we use, we would need the admins to make sure to test that it is installed correctly and is available on all nodes in the cluster. Extra operational steps may be necessary to be sure that codecs are available on newly-deployed nodes. Hence did not want to add it in the basic table creation / installation process. HBase does not ship with Snappy or LZO due to licensing issues. LZ4 comes with hadoop but has to made available on all nodes. 

Will upload a new patch shortly.
Uploaded patch 002 that addresses Haibo's suggestions.

+1 on the latest patch. [~rohithsharma] Do you want to take a look ?

overall patch looks good to me. 

One doubt in domain table row key. Domain table row key has only domainId. It should be appended with clusterId right? Otherwise it wont be able to track it for domainId belongs to which cluster right?
nit: I see that DomainTable class has our names. Lets make it generic like user1 user2 group1 group2 instead of our names.

Thanks [~vrushalic] for the patch. The patch looks good overall. Some minor comments:

1) Some comments in the DomainRowKey class is still referring to app_flow_table.

2) The DomainTable is missing writers as one of its columns. Also, let's add a link of TimelineDomain documentation (possibly the apache official doc where it is introduced).

3) I recall that we want to do compression on the domain table. Is that something done at table creation time?

The other thing I am thinking is, whether do we want to think of the cases where one application modifies domains posted by another application. This seems allowed at the moment.

Thanks [~haibochen] for the review!

Yes I will update the domain row key documentation, good catch!

bq. The DomainTable is missing writers as one of its columns. Also, let's add a link of TimelineDomain documentation (possibly the apache official doc where it is introduced).
We can have more columns that may not be listed. It is not necessary to define all columns though. But I will add it. 
Good point about the link to TimelineDomain documentation, will add it. 

bq. I recall that we want to do compression on the domain table. Is that something done at table creation time?
Very good point. I have not added in compression as part of the table creation. I was thinking we might want to mention it in the documentation and point to hbase docs regarding enabling it. The reason is that, no matter what codec we use, we would need the admins to make sure to test that it is installed correctly and is available on all nodes in the cluster. Extra operational steps may be necessary to be sure that codecs are available on newly-deployed nodes. Hence did not want to add it in the basic table creation / installation process. HBase does not ship with Snappy or LZO due to licensing issues. LZ4 comes with hadoop but has to made available on all nodes. 

Will upload a new patch shortly.
Uploaded patch 002 that addresses Haibo's suggestions.

+1 on the latest patch. [~rohithsharma] Do you want to take a look ?

overall patch looks good to me. 

One doubt in domain table row key. Domain table row key has only domainId. It should be appended with clusterId right? Otherwise it wont be able to track it for domainId belongs to which cluster right?
nit: I see that DomainTable class has our names. Lets make it generic like user1 user2 group1 group2 instead of our names.
